entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I have genuine interest in the field of enterprise software and my eagerness to continuously expand my knowledge. I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I also believe that obtaining the SAP certification will help me more in my career after graduation. Thank you. 

Sincerely, 
Anh Le.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action - Date Copy - model at Day granularity
entry.content:
Hi Nono, 

   I'm wondering why aren't you using the copy step to achieve this? 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
That's a lot of detailed questions, and honestly you could find the answers to almost all of them in the standard documentation, and could figure out the rest from a bit of playing around. But in short:

  1. No
  2. See Question 4
  3. There's a command on the Options button
  4. See Question 2 and Answer 3
  5. No
  6. No
  7. See the Server Settings
  8. Nothing / No

If you need additional details, see my first para.

entry.title: Re: "Unsorted" Vs. "My Unsorted" Folder in SAP Enable Now...
entry.content:
1. Because you haven't selected them for synching ('Check Out Objects'). And then they just appear in Unsorted.
  2. They won't, unless the other Authors Check them Out

In general, unsorted should be empty, so get into the habit of moving content out of there.

entry.title: Re: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
Hi jhardwood,

Here's an excerpt from a statement of direction blog post for SAP Analytics BI  that might help you with your planning.

"We plan to release the first version of SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 in Q4 2024, followed by Support Packages every year. As per our standard maintenance policy, it will be supported until at least end of 2029 for mainstream maintenance, and 2031 for priority 1 support. To maximize the value for our customers, we will focus ongoing investments on the most-widely adopted SAP BusinessObjects BI solutions: SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence, single source .unx universes, SAP Crystal Reports, SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, Lumira Designer and the SAP BusinessObjects BI platform."

entry.title: Re: How we can top up gift cards in Sap Customer Checkout

entry.title: Re: How we can top up gift cards in Sap Customer Checkout

I noted that it's not possible and this is an expected move.

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Sub-contracting MRP area not showing in MD04
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we have two material codes for which we have maintained sub-contracting MRP area in material master MRP1 view. When we checked the MRP area in MD04 screen one material is showing plant and sub-contracting MRP area but one material is only showing plant MRP area. Can you pls help what may be the root cause of this issue. Pics attached for reg.

126XX76 is the failing material & 126XX66 is successful case.

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content:
I would use story CSS to achieve this.

In the story CSS, create an entry similar to:

.red-button .sap-custom-button {
	background-color: red;
	color: white;
}

Then you need to apply or clear the class to the button depending on the selection state. Something like:

if (this.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers().length > 0) {
	Button_1.setCssClass('red-button');
} else {
	Button_1.setCssClass('');
}

The problem you might have is that I don't think it is possible to have no selection in an input control. The event will only fire when a selection is made. If you uncheck all members, then the application is in a wait state until a selection is made again.

entry.title: Change Key field in table
entry.content: Hi , I want to change custom table primary key. Already they are maintain WERKS,MATNR & MRP Area. I need to make VKORG as Key field in table but VKORG position also needs to correction. if i make the changes in table will it have any effect in existing data in the production server ??

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content:
Hello,

You need a css class like this :

.popupRed .sap-custom-popup-footer-button {
    background-color:red;
}

and a script like this on the event onSelect of your InputControl :

if (!InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().isAllMembersSelected()) {
	Popup_1.setCssClass("popupRed");
} else {
	Popup_1.setCssClass("");
}

 I hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content: Hello, yes, you can use in the if statement : if (!InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().isAllMembersSelected())

the questions you asked are not as simple as "Do you like sweet or sour?"

Hi,

both parts are only possible by programming and using UDT's/UDO's and you can't use the standard-commissions anymore. You had to gain it by quries and reports.

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

My name is Nastasja Jackson from Louisiana. I am a single woman/mom of color trying to transition into the world of SAP.

I have a background in project management, education technology, recruitment and finance. I am beyond excited to learn about this program and would be delighted to receive the opportunity to continue learning about SAP, project management in this space, consulting, and implementation.

I believe I am a great fit for this program because I deserve a chance to advance my career with one of the world's most innovative technologies that help change people's lives and make the world better through advanced systems.

I am eager to continue developing the skills I need to achieve my short and long term goals of becoming either an SAP Project Manager, SAP Technical Consultant, or Digital Solution Advisor.

Thank you for considering my request.

entry.title: Re: build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp - The redire...
entry.content:
Hello Saad,

Have you tried adding the wildcards, of the arbitrary path, like

`https://*.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/login/callback/**`

Best Regards,

Harsha

 

Reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/security-considerations-for-sap-authorization-and-trust-management-service?q=login%2Fcallback%2F%2a%2a#loio88b7d9d4c6ff4498b48dbc0b7be8a294

entry.title: The Probable Loop-Hole (SE97) – Called up Transactions !
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Today, we will be discussing on an interesting SAP Security Related Topic, with its functional intervention. 

Do read the full blog...

  • In general terms, when we execute a T-code in the SAP System, it calls various T-codes by-default in the background, which might push our SAP system to various security, data breaches and also to various data leaks.

Let’s understand the scenario clearly using an example:-

For example, an End-User executes the T-code “ME51N” – Create Purchase Requisition, if now the user wants to view the Material Master Data, he can view that data, even though he is not having the access of MM03 T-code in his user id.

This thing is possible because of the “Called Transactions”. This kind of thing is not at all desirable, whenever we are dealing with certain confidential master datas, & we don’t want the End User to even have a look at it !

Whenever we execute some T-Codes, the system checks the consistency at the table “TCDCOUPLES” , this table actually provides us with a complete data mapping of the “Calling T-Code” & the “Called T-Code”.

In our example, the transaction “ME51N” is calling the transaction “MM03” .

If the Check Field is "BLANK", as show in the screenshot attached, it means the Calling T-Code can access the Called T-Code without the need of any  Authorization Checks !  

Now, if we want to restrict the Call Transactions from Calling certain data sensitive Master Data Related Transactions, then we have to simply alter the “Check ID” Field to “YES”.

After this alteration, the End User will only be able to view / display the Master Data, only when the user id will have that particular T-code executing authorization.

 

Key Takeaways from this Blog :-

You should always do the review of the critical “Called Transactions”, time to time in order to prevent certain sensitive data leaks.

 

Blog Written By:-

Er. Pratik Das

B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering,

SAP Functional Consultant,

SAP Enthusiast.

entry.title: Closing Cockpit - Org Unit parameters with program execution
entry.content:
Dear Community

in context of Financial Closing Cockpit (on S/4HANA, basic version via t-codes FCLOCO -  Execution), selection of Company Codes is not considered upon task execution for programs, e.g. „Post Depreciations“, also missing default from Task List for Posting Period (defined with t-code FCLOCOT), e.g. 01/2024, as per below/attached screenshot.

Kindly advise on what setting I/we might be missing out on.

entry.title: Re: Batch Query Duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi Kadlene,

it make no sense to join to OBTN by ItemCode (only) you don't need all batches on this point.

When you join on the OIBT you have to connect it with the IGN1 by using BaseLine,BaseEntry,Basetype and direction
e.g.
OIBT.BaseLine = IGN1.LineNum 

regards Lothar

entry.title: Extract Delta Records from SAP ECC & CRM into Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). What should be the best way to ingest data from these sources? How to extract delta records? Do we need BW Bridge or SAP DI should work?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Custom theme import failed via theme designer
entry.content:
Hi @mstancheva15! I'm just guessing based on the error message you provided "This zip-file contains more than on theme. Upload rejected.".

This error is thrown, like it says, when the zip you import contains more than one theme.

Maybe my blog post What is a theme, anyways? can give a bit of background on the structure in the zip (knowing that the zip basically contains a theming repository). More or less, the zip contains folders ("frameworks") that contain folders ("libraries") that contain folders ("themes") that contain less files or resources ("files"), e.g.

Base # <- framework
└─baseLib # <- library
  └─ my_theme # <- theme
    ├─base.less # <- file
    └─…
UI5 # <- framework
├─sap/ui/core/themes # <- library (almost…)
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─library.less # <- file
│   └─…
└─sap/m/themes # <- library (…)
  └─my_theme # <- theme
    ├─library.less # <- file
    └─…
UR # <- framework
├─baseLib # <- library
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─standards.less # <- file
│   └─…
├─ls # <- library
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─standards.less # <- file
│   └─…
└─c2 # <- library
  └─my_theme # <- theme
    ├─standards.less # <- file
    └─…

(It's a bit more complicated, the structure of each framework is defined by the sSourcePathPattern of this frameworks .theming file, see e.g. the one of the Base framework, but for the sake of this answer the above is enough.)

So: the error is saying that in your zip file there is some library of some framework that contains a folder (i.e. a theme) that is named different than the folders of all other libraries of all other frameworks in your zip file. In my example that could be

Base/baseLib/my_theme
UI5/sap/ui/core/themes/my_theme
UI5/sap/m/themes/my_theme
UI5/sap/m/themes/my_theme2 # <- whoops, this is a different theme
UR/baseLib/my_theme
UR/ls/my_theme
UR/c2/my_theme

If importing a fresh export of your theme from the theme designer doesn't solve the problem, you would have to clean your zip manually, i.e.

  • unzip your exported theme
  • look for the different theme and remove it
  • zip the cleaned-up folder
  • and import that with /UI5/THEME_TOOL.

happy to participate in this community 🙂

First time that I heard about SAP (software and ecosystem) was in November of 1998. I remember the 'look and feel" session during the kickoff of the SAP project of National Bank of Greece (I was the team leader for implementation of FI-AM module and team member for the development of authorizations in modules [FI-AM, MM, PM, etc].

Aggeliki K.

entry.title: Re: Robosapiens and SAPGUI Library in Robot Framework: At...
entry.content:
Hello @AutomationTester,

that is an interesting constellation. Please let us know what exactly caused the error.

Making a recommendation is not that easy. It depends on many factors, such as which programming languages are permitted, what expertise is available in the company, etc. On the other hand I have not looked into other OSS solutions for SAP GUI automation, so I cannot recommend any or it would be very difficult for me to do that. Hope you understand that. When I automate the SAP GUI for Windows, I primarily use PowerShell without any abstraction layer - that is my most effective way.

Best regards
Stefan

Robert

entry.title: Re: Succession used without EC, then EC implementation -...
entry.content:
Hi Cle, 

Thanks for your further questions. I would like to further explain the following two points: 

1. Since you are using MDF nomination method, the position ID should remain the same.

2. For the nomination info, we use position ID + User ID to trace it. So if the user ID keeps the same, there is no impact before and after EC implementation. 

BR,

Beibei

entry.title: Costing Variants | Standard | Plan | Actual- Usage in Production Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question regarding Costing Variants specifically related to product costing.

We currently utilize three distinct costing variants:
1. Costing Variant (Standard Cost) B1 for standard cost estimation, which I use for standard costing.
2. Costing Variant (Plan) B2 for plan in Production Orders.
3. Costing Variant (Actual) B3 for actual in Production Orders.

Each costing variant is paired with a different costing sheet and overhead rate:
- Costing Variant B1 is paired with Costing Sheet X1, which includes an overhead (O/H) of 10%.
- Costing Variant B2 is paired with Costing Sheet X2, with an overhead of 20%.
- Costing Variant B3 is paired with Costing Sheet X3, with an overhead of 30%.

To clarify, I am using different overhead rates for each costing sheet for transparency.

After creating a Production Order, issuing materials, confirming activities, completing Goods Receipt, and conducting Month End Closing or Event-Based Product Posting all have been done successfully.

I am trying to understand how Costing Variants B1, B2 and B3 are used in the calculations and postings of Plan, Actual, and Target Values in Production Order. If we discuss the valuation of material and activity prices, the answer can become complex and diluted.

Query1:   With the combinations of Costing Variants and Costing Sheets (B1 and X1), (B2 and X2), (B3 and X3), which overhead percentage or costing sheet should be applied to the Plan Value, Actual Value, and Target Value for overhead amount?

 
Query2: What is the use of Costing Variant for Standard Cost (B1),  use of Costing Variant for Plan (B2), use of Costing Variant for Actual (B3)?
 
Note: It is not related to Actual Costing.
 
Thanks in advance.
Best regards,
Sid
 
FIN Product Cost Planning  FIN Cost Object Controlling SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance FIN (Finance) FIN Controlling

entry.title: Generate a Development Backend System Using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools
entry.content:
Even with a lot of modern tools today's mobile development to consume an SAP backend system in a cloud environment like SAP Mobile Services still faces many challenges. For example below:

  • The backend system is running inside an on-premise system and the OData services implemented using NetWeaver Gateway system is out of date.
  • You have a big OData services that contains many entity sets that are not needed by the mobile apps. During the app development It ends up generating a pretty big proxy client in this case that becomes a burden for the client apps.
  • The backend system is not yet ready to be consumed by the mobile apps because it may be still under development, and the services might contain critical bugs to be fixed by the backend team. The mobile and frontend team have to wait until those issues get resolved before starting the actual coding for the UX and mobile app.
  • In the early stage of the project, the business consultants and architects need to create a PoC for the mobile consumption of the backend OData services, but the service is only allowed to be accessed in a read only mode and the client can't update any of its data.

In this blog post, we'll demonstrate how to create a development backend system that the mobile team can fully control out of the existing backend OData services using the SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools to overcome the above challenges. For example, in the early phase of your mobile project, you can build a PoC of the mobile app using the development backend system without having to make modifications on any of the existing backend systems.

Suppose you have set up correctly the SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools with the mobile services landscape, and you can view the mobile destinations in Visual Studio Code environment correctly:

Please note that the OData services might contains many entity sets that are not needed by the client application:

In this case we want to include only the entity sets needed by your mobile apps to our development backend system, click the "Pune" toolbar button:

You will see the prune dialog like below:

In the prune dialog, select only the entity sets that are needed by your mobile apps:

Click "OK" button to close the dialog, and you will see an updated OData CSDL model that should only contain the entity sets you need in order to build your mobile app:

Now let's build a development backend system using the above CSDL model. In order to do that, click the "Generate Development Backend" toolbar button:

Select "Yes" to confirm the generation:

Select "Yes" to include the test data from the original backend system. Mobile Backend Tools will copy 1000 records from the original backend system to the development backend system for each entity set in the current CSDL model.

Press enter key to accept the mobile destination name for the development backend system:

And the process of generating the development backend has started:

When the generation has been complete, you will see below:

You will also notice that a new mobile destination has been created in your mobile app. Now let's take a look at the generated development backend system in mobile services. Click "purchaseorder-dev" mobile destination:

You will see the development backend system only contains the 6 entity sets we selected in the prune dialog. And in the "Diagram" view, you see a much smaller OData model in the UI:

Now let's test this backend system. Right click the mobile destination for the development backend system, and click "Run Test Query" menu item:

The test query page shows up like below:

Run some tests in the test query page against this development backend system:

You can see this newly generated OData services is working as expected.

As a summary, in this blog post we have demonstrated how to generate a development backend system from an existing backend system along with the test data using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools. With the generated development backend system that is fully owned by the mobile frontend team, the development of the backend and mobile app can be decoupled and it's also very easy to build a PoC for a mobile project at the early stage of the project.

entry.title: FAGLB03 - Display Balances (New) Differences with FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New)
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In FAGLB03 - Display Balances (New) , I entered the GL Account,Company Code and fiscal year and executed. Balance is 39,000. When i click on the 10th period, the line item toal shows 1,80,000. I even checked FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New) , it  is showing  differences. We are in ECC 6.0

How to resolve the differences? Please suggest.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: T code for all customer master
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

can you please let us know the t code to access all customer master date like PAN, GST number, Contact details, date of creation, user name, TCS tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Integration
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

If you have created an SAP UI5 site it is possible that you can utlise SAP Companion with that site.  Are your users launching your UI5 apps from a Fiori Launchpad or Build Work Zone?  If they are, you can turn on SAP Companion at the Fiori Launchpad and Build Work Zone levels.  If your users are not accessing the UI5 apps from Fiori Launchpad or Build Work Zone, it may be necessary to use the 3rd party version of SAP Companion, which requires technical integration using Javascript.

Let me know some more information and we can try to work out the best way forward.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Hi @egbertvenema_mybrand,

why do you want to call the system itself remotely? Isn't there a local API that you can use? I found the https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_CREDITMEMOREQUESTTP business object interface. Did you consider using this? 

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: Empty destination logistics area field in inbound del...
entry.content:
Hi Eszter,

In case you are referring to receiving without task scenario, system will always try to propose a taregt logistics area during post goods receipt, only under some special circumstance system will fail to propose a target logistics area, for example, in the advanced material flow rule of site, 'Empty Bin' is maintained for 'Put-Away Strategy', but there is no empty bin in this site currently.

In case you are referring to receiving with one-step or two-step task scenario, in corresponding logistic model, you can select 'When user requests' for field 'Logistics Area Proposal'.

Kind Regards,

Henry

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hi @Shyamprasad_Nayak, 

First of all, thank you for your kind note.

I am glad to read that you find these posts useful.

Concerning your question, I think it would be more relevant on the posts focusing on SAP Risk and Assurance Management where the colleagues will have better expertise on this solution. For instance, SAP Financial Compliance / Risk and Assurance Management covers much more than Finance.

Nevertheless, I had a look for an answer to your question and I believe the following sections of the SAP Help Portal will be helpful in understanding what is available in standard: 

  • Connectivity and Integration > Adding a System Type | SAP Help Portal => See step 6, "For non-SAP systems, use EXTERNAL"
  • Creating an Automated Procedure | Help Portal
  • Integrate | SAP Help Portal

I trust this helps

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Error with Call Transaction in BDC (ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP)
entry.content:
BDC is an obsolete term, it's been renamed Batch Input a very long time ago.

Not all transactions support batch input.

You may search the forum and SAP notes before asking.

See: 1951318 - Batch input in BP transaction not supported - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

Dirk is correct when you says that there is no way to have some standard content displayed while other content objects are hidden, however, there is a workaround.  If you configure SAP Companion to show customer-specific content and standard content in the QA environment and modify the standard objects that you want to use, you can then configure SAP Companion in Production to only show customer-specific content.  This works because when you modify a standard content object, it acts just like one of your objects.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Fast entry TAB in Prodution order
entry.content: Dear Experts, can anyone please reply.

entry.title: Re: Classification Tab in Equipment Master
entry.content: Hi I think you can use screen sequence number 099 that will give you different tabs as per your class.

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Hi Kai,

Calling the public API was with a possible move to BTP in mind. If I program everything as it should work on BTP, that move would be a lot easier. And since I found tutorials that seemed to do something like it, with a lot of the objects and steps in line with expectations, I was convinced I was on the right track. It appears I found myself in a rabbit hole which I couldn't back out of.

The local API makes much more sense, not sure why that wasn't the method that popped up. Possibly because I was searching for the wrong thing.

Thanks for the insight! I'll get back to making this process work 🙂

Kind regards,
Egbert

Shyam

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP ERP: HowTo-Guide (Part 2 - First use case)
entry.content:
@smohan29 the error "Cloud type not selected" means that there is an error in configuring the connection. I assume you might have missed to activate the BC-sets (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP%20NetWeaver%20Add-On%20for%20Event%20enablement%201.0/e966e6c0e61443ebaa0270a4bae4b363/2c45b09315bd4d648db2894cbf572aa1.html?locale=en-US)

Kind regards,
Martin

Have you found any solution for it? I also have the same question.

entry.title: Re: How do you update the PO Number field on multiple ord...
entry.content:
Hey RoniC,

Here's Imre from SAP.

We do not have a ready-made report for such purposes in standard. 

You might create your own solution.

The document numbers are distributed in the Function NUMBER_GET_NEXT, so in case you only need new numbers for each PO, then I'd suggest to check what unique identifier your current PO's have (tracking number, requisition or shopping cart number [in case of SRM]) .

Based on that unique ID you could ask the Function to provide new numbers.

BR

Imre

entry.title: Re: How to deploy multiple intents of same Fiori app to W...
entry.content: Also faced the same issue - @MikeDoyle Did you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @sayuj_nair,

Thank you for your feedback!

Have you set up the Model Outputs correctly? The order of the model’s outputs must align with the order of the classes (see Step 6). It could be a cause of this error.

Best regards,
Jianghan

entry.title: Re: Which CDS view gives the Transaction Codes of Journal...
entry.content:
Dear shilpa1581 ,

kindly check cds I_JournalEntry could fulfil your requirements or not. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/bc3ccd578b90a856e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Activate SAP SuccessFactors SCIM IPS connector for Permission-Based User Sync for Story Reportin
entry.content:
Hello Aesha,

Generally, sf.api.version is set out of the box when the IAS/IPS configuration is done via Upgrade center.

You can share the URL and if the system is set up with something .../odata/ then it relates to sf.api.version 1 i.e. odata set up. However if OData is not in the URL it may relates to SCIM set up. 

Please ensure the transformation template is set accordingly, just changing from Odata to SCIM will not help unless you have the right transformation template specific for SCIM APIs. you can double the transformation for SCIM via theImplementation Design Principles.

For addtional support, you may log a support case and share the system access toso that the team can review and validate the SCIM API version and transformation template and make sure it is accurate.

Regards,
Rajdeep

PM, Stories in Peopla Analytics

entry.title: CustomerExtensionForAdditionalTabs is not Working in MyInbox Fiori App Extensions
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am doing Extension for the MyInbox fiori app and I had used the Extension point "CustomerExtensionForAdditionalTabs" to add the additional tab and when i run locally in SAP Webide (SAPUI5 1.114.0) and it is working(Showing the Additional tab) and when deploy to SAP On-Premise system and try to open in Fiori Launchpad(SAPUI5 1.114.0) and the additional tab  is not Showing  in MyInox in SAP Fiori Launchpad.

Notice : We observed that it is not calling the Extension Code also in SAP Fiori Launchpad and Is any thing is missing.

Please find the attached document in detail

entry.title: Inbound IDOC ORDCHG Sales Order Items mismatch
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working with the IDOC interface for sales order ORDERS05. receiving the IDOC from Boomi and posting the IDOC to SAP. 

The scenario sales order item change delete and add new items. if they delete 2 items and add 2 items to the existing sales order with ORDCHG. while updating sales order items no are getting overwritten. Because of this third party is not able to track the sales order items. 

if they send items like 40,50,60 as new items but in SAP getting created like 10,20,30.. but if we create same scenario in manually in SAP, it is working fine. 

let me know any has seen similar scenarios. Thank you 

Regards,

Arsul

entry.title: Re: Empty destination logistics area field in inbound del...
entry.content: Really fine and useful setup:) THANKS, IT WORKS!

entry.title: Re: E-mail service provider for Marketing Cloud
entry.content:
To configure Office 365 SMTP with SAP Hybris Marketing On-Premise:

  1. Log in to SAP Hybris Marketing and navigate to Administration -> Communication Management -> Communication Systems.
  2. Create a New Communication System:
    • Set Host Name: smtp.office365.com
    • Port: 587
    • Enable TLS/SSL
    • Enter your Office 365 email and password.
  3. Save and Test by sending a test email.

In SCOT (SAPconnect):

  1. Activate SMTP service using SMICM -> GOTO -> Services.
  2. Create an SMTP node in SCOT:
    • Mail Host: smtp.office365.com
    • Port: 587
    • Enable TLS.
  3. Monitor using SOST.
  4. Alternative SMTP server- SMTPget

entry.title: Re: Transfer Status of the bill remains 'Not Transferred'...
entry.content:
Hello,

If closed bills remain in the 'Not Transferred' status, this indicates that the integration with the S4 has not been set up properly.

Some prerequisites are necessary for a functioning integration, which are described in detail in the 'Integration Guide'.
Depending on the S4 variant, the chapters
- Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
or
- Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA

are of particular relevance with regard to Bill Integration.

Kind regards
Ralf

Could you please help him and potential other customers within this blog?

Regards

Silke

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Deprecation of 4X8
entry.content:
Hi @Edrilan_Berisha, 

Thank you ! Deprecation of this scope item is long overdue. The news about all of the new features are exciting 🙂

Regards,

Bohdan

entry.title: SAP-validated partner use case on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub
entry.content:
Traditionally, accelerators were only thought to be a preserve of the PartnerEdge Build partners but as we saw a lot of consulting partners trying use Business Accelerator Hub to promote consulting projects. So responding to the market we partnered with Partner Ecosystem Success's to host their program for PartnerEdge Service partners, SAP-validated partner use case on the site. 

SAP-validated partner use cases are specific use cases that the partner has both expertise and experience in implementing. This is verified by SAP prior to certifying the listing.

Why does this make sense on SAP Business Accelerator Hub?

Aligning to the mission of the website:

To accelerate the customer's time to value.

Customers do not just want pre-packaged content to go faster sometime they need to be connected to the right experts to navigate them through their journey. It is just another way of fulfilling the same need i.e., relieve the anxiety or stress in implementing SAP projects.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP : Enabling custom actions with a dialog for additional input fields

The changes are getting saved but facing this issue

entry.title: Can i have the SAP transaction to check 7500 equipments maintenance package tick mark verification?
entry.content: We have more than 7500 equipment's in SAP.  How to quickly verify, all the equipment's maintenance package having the tick mark.  Can i have the SAP transaction code?

entry.title: Re: SAC - how to filter Table through checkboxes (multi-selections) in New Model
entry.content: Can this be done with account dimension??

entry.title: Re: Change of email address or phoneNumber is triggering...
entry.content:
Hi @grohitg238 

The change email address or phone number accountUpdated event alone does not provide the changed email address or phone number in the webhook payload. However after the change your email or edit phone number screen, the flow should trigger the update profile screen, where you see the changed email address or phone number. And if you go ahead and hit save on that screen, the accountUpdated event will be triggered one more time with the changed email address or phone number in the payload. 

The API call sequence should look like this: 

And you should receive two accountUpdated events like this: 

The first event is triggered without the email address or phone number in the payload when you verify the new email address or phone number, and the second one is triggered with the email address or phone number when you actually update the account on the profile screen. 

Here is the webhook configuration in the Console. 

Hope that helps 🙂

entry.title: how to automate email alerts from Cloud ALM to MS Team channel
entry.content:
Please let us know how to automate email alerts from Cloud ALM to MS Team channel

Best regards

SAP Support

entry.title: Key Error in SAP DI
entry.content:
I am trying to apply the concept of regular expressions in a python operator to handle double quotes in the data coming from HANA DB and after the regular expressions are applied in the dataframe, I am stuck at a point where I am unable to send the dataframe to another python operator where the data in the dataframe is placed in a txt file and sent to HDFS server. The error message is:  File "<string>", line 35, in process KeyError: 'data_outcome' 'data_outcome' [line 35] Container is terminated. ExitCode=63

Kindly help to solve the error.

entry.title: Re: HANA Design-Time HDI composite role
entry.content:
Hello Konstantin_Epanov,
You are doing more or less the right way of creating a role, it's hard to say a clear solution without looking at actual grants file of contanier C and related .hdbrole files of A and B .

The error "not authorized to access the referenced object" does not only mean the container C cannot access referenced object , It can also mean Container A or B roles which are created might not have the proper access to catolog objects it is referenced to.

PS: Just know that OO roles have to end with "#" and yes it have to grantable to others as #OO grants this roles to RT user.

regards

sagar

entry.title: Re: Capturing the approval form status on SAP BPA (Build...
entry.content:
Hi @Isyraf_Afifi,

One workaround i did for such a scenario was to create a Decision for each approve and reject step.

In the decision, i will create a decision table whose output will be a hardcoded text 'Approved' or 'Rejected' based on the step in which the process flows.

Regards,

Akhil Das

entry.title: Re: Introducing new type of Data Access Control "Operator and Value" for SAP Datasphere
entry.content: For information, last time I tried this feature it didn't support variable usage within analytic models. In other words variables can't be used in analytic models when a this kind of DAC is activated on underlying view. Which is a huge drawback as of now until this is enhanced.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Welcome @Aggeliki_K - great to have your expertise here. Are you from Greece? So far, we have a location group for Thessaloniki - set up by our SAP Community members. Feel free to check out our location groups and interest groups and join some conversations there.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance-Asset Accounting Frequently Asked Questions
entry.content:
1 Asset Accounting - Basic Configuration Asset Accounting - Configuration

1.1 Organizational Structure Organization Structure

1.1.1 GA-FI-AA-CF-001 Additional Depreciation Areas Business

Context: Customer implementing S/4HANA Cloud project, different requirements for compliance, tax law, internal management, different depreciation of fixed as-sets under different depreciation methods.Currently the system only supports depreciation areas for compliance and tax law. Do you support customers to create new depreciation areas autonomously? Fixed asset deprecation is different among local, tax and internal management purposes. Currently, only two deprecation areas are supported in S/4HANA cloud.

Answer: Update 20240611: Are additional depreciation areas required? As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2208, the following new scope items are available: 5HG - Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area 5KF - Asset Under Construction – Additional Deprecation Area Prerequisite: need to be selected and activated when initial scoping. Cannot be added subsequently.

1.1.2 GA-FI-AA-CF-002 Additional Depreciation Keys and Depreciation Methods

Business Context:
Chinese customers are implementing S/4HANA Cloud projects, usually with straight-line 3% net residual value depreciation for intangible assets, is the related depreciation method supported?
Chinese customers are implementing S/4HANA Cloud projects, usually different asset classes have different net scrap values using different depreciation methods, does it allow customers to create new depreciation keys on their own?

Answer:
The depreciation method "Straight-Line 3% Net Residual Value" is already supported in cloud products. The relevant depreciation key is CD04.

S/4HANA Cloud does not support customer-created depreciation keys. With the 2202 Release, customers can view specific information about the supported depreciation keys via APP Depreciation Keys: Show Details.

20240611 Update: Starting with 2402, customers can request pre-approved - custom depreciation keys

Prerequisite:

Pre-approved Expert Configuration is only available for 3SL and 2SL for CBC System Environment

Application Process:

 ▪ Request Expert Configuration

▪ In SAP for ME, submit an incident for your development system, select component XX-S4C-OPR-SRV, subject: Create New Depreciation key

▪ The file “Depreciation Key – Template” is sent to the customer to fill in the information to customize the required information for the new depreciation key required;

Note:

▪ Customer needs to fill in the provided form template 

   The data is responsible and knows the function of the depreciation key;

  • The customer needs to test the functionality of the new depreciation key thoroughly before it can be deployed to the production system;

1.2 Configuration

1.2.1 GA-FI-AA-CF- 003 Whether modification of technical clearing account is allowed for integrated acquisition of fixed assets

Business Context:

Customer is allowed to modify technical clearing account in case of S/4HANA Cloud project implementation.

Answer:

S/4HANA Cloud, it is not possible to modify the default technical clearing account.

1.2.2 GA-FI-AA-CF- 004 Whether G/L account modification is allowed for the asset

Business Context:

The customer needs to use G/L accounts with original values, accumulated depreciation, and accumulated amortization of assets that differ from the standard when implementing S/4HANA Cloud projects where different asset classes are posted.

Answer:

S/4HANA Cloud, SSCUI 102622 allows to modify the G/L account configuration for different asset classes.

1.2.3 GA-FI-AA-CF- 005 Does the asset number range allow additions and modifications

Business Context:

customers are implementing S/4HANA Cloud projects,

Answer:

New depreciation keys are not yet supported in S/4HANA Cloud. You are only allowed to modify the association of an asset class to a standard asset number area.

2  Asset Accounting - Master Data

2.1.1 GA-FI-AA-MD- 001 Whether the asset number range is customizable and supports more digits of the asset number

Business Context:

The customer needs to set up custom asset coding for different fixed asset classes in the implementation of the S/4HANA Cloud project.

Answer:

In the current S/4HANA Cloud release, the predefined asset number range is assigned to the asset class by default (SSCUI 102606) and the external number is not supported for asset classes. The customized asset category is externally-given.

In the current S/4HANA Cloud release, only 8-digit asset codes are supported. Reference SAP Note 2972613 - Different fixed asset code length - S/4HANA CLOUD 

2.1.2 GA-FI-AA-MD- 002 whether the asset class can be customized

Business Context:

A customer in an S/4HANA Cloud project needs to set up a custom fixed asset class.

Answer:

With the current S/4HANA Cloud release, custom asset classes are available (SSCUI 102606).

2.1.3 GA-FI-AA-MD- 003 Which fields of the different asset classes are displayed and which fields are hidden?

Business Context:

In the implementation of S/4HANA Cloud projects, the standard asset classes provide a default layout of master data (layout), which fields are supported in different layouts.

Answer:

Layout is provided by default and properties such as display, hide, and mandatory entry of fields cannot be modified.

2.1.4 GA-FI-AA-MD- 004 whether additional fields can be created in the fixed asset master data

Business Context:

In S/4HANA Cloud projects, customers need to create additional fields in the fixed asset master data.

Answer:

See https://help.sap.com/viewer/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/LATEST/zh-CN/d005b509884040b18a9d6c092082a325.html     

2.1.5 GA-FI-AA-MD- 005 Do you support a mass upload of master data after your GA-FI-AA-MD- 005 system goes live?

Business Context:

Customer is implementing S/4HANA Cloud project to perform mass upload of fixed asset master data via data migration. But customers still have the need to upload fixed assets in batch in S/4HANA Cloud.

Answer:

When the system is in the status of a non-legacy data migration, there is no mass creation of fixed assets in the existing S/4HANA Cloud Fixed Assets App.

  1. Customers can consider switching the relevant company codes to migration status and mass upload of fixed asset master data, which needs to be done here with caution as the system is already live.
  2. Customers can focus on the relevant API interfaces for Fixed Assets to see the possibility to reach a mass upload by using APIs.

2.1.6 GA-FI-AA-MD- 006 Do you support mass modification of master data after system go-live?

Business Context:

Customers are implementing S/4HANA Cloud projects where customers need to modify the fields of fixed assets in bulk.

Answer:

In the Fixed Assets app of the existing S/4HANA Cloud release, there is no mass processing of fixed assets. Customers can focus on the relevant API interfaces for Fixed Assets to see the possibility to reach a mass upload by using the APIs.

2.1.7 GA-FI-AA-MD- 007 Whether the asset class associated with the investment item can be modified

Business Context:

The customer uses an investment project to collect AuC expenses in an S/4HANA Cloud project, and when the relevant investment project is approved, an AuC number is automatically created with a default AuC class of 4001. However, in real business, the customer creates custom asset under construction classes and needs to link the new asset class to the investment project.

Answer:

Customers can flag the newly created custom asset classes for investment measures in the configuration SSCUI 102606 Define Asset Classes for asset classes. Also request SAP via incident to associate the new asset class with the investment project.

2.1.8 GA-FI-AA-MD- 008 Whether asset master data can be created in bulk

Answer: See note 3219541 - Mass create Fixed assets in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

2.1.9 GA-FI-AA-MD- 008 Can you restrict the cost center field from being entered?

Redirect to https://blogs.sap.com/? p=1764459

2.2 Legacy Data Migration

2.2.1 GA-FI-AA-MD- 001 Fixed Asset Data Migration Guided Documentation

Business Context:

Field descriptions for the templates related to the Fixed asset migration object by a customer in an implementation of an S/4HANA Cloud project.

Answer:

 "Fixed Assets - Master Data" https://help.sap.com/viewer/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/LATEST/zh-CN/079bbe8febe54fe99d56ce5c16cdce73.html

Fixed Asset - Postings https://help.sap.com/viewer/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/LATEST/zh-CN/3c0dddd9424549fe9c46db30780c128c.html

"Fixed asset - Usage object" https://help.sap.com/viewer/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/LATEST/zh-CN/491cf1745344486b81b8675be3851693.html

2.2.2 GA-FI-AA-MD- 002 How to View and Control Fixed Asset Data Migration Status

Business Context:

Customer’s field description for the templates related to the fixed asset migration object in the implementation of S/4HANA Cloud project

Answer:

APP: Make Company Code Settings Asset Accounting-Specific

2.2.3 GA-FI-AA-MD- 003 in data migration, whether additional fields can be migrated or custom fields

Business Context:

In an S/4HANA Cloud implementation project, customers need to migrate additional or customized fields during migration of fixed asset master data.

Answer:

A list of migration objects that support custom fields and custom logic (Custom Fields and Custom Logic apps) is listed below

  https://help.sap.com/viewer/70cd8175333c4d1b9ae3a08fbab81397/LATEST/en-US/9f67f4b52776436ab67df82bda38b95e.html

 

The migration object for Fixed Assets - Master Data is also a customer-specific field, see link below

https://help.sap.com/viewer/cc9ecc5f5f6b400a98d10e930324f7ad/LATEST/en-US/079bbe8febe54fe99d56ce5c16cdce73.html

2.2.4 GA-FI-AA-MD- 004 How to Migrate Asset Quantities

Business Context:

Customer in S/4HANA Cloud project, import number of assets reported error

Answer:

 Check SAP Note 2874065 - Quantity Posting via Data Migration Cockpit (DMC) S/4HANA CLOUD.

The explanations and examples explain how to post quantities and amounts, respectively.

Component:FI-AA-AA-C

2.2.5 GA-FI-AA-MD- 005 in data migration, common errors

Business Context:

The customer has some errors during the migration of master data and posting data for fixed assets in an S/4HANA Cloud project.

Answer:

Error

Instruction

AA212

2775822 - Error AA212: Migration for Fixed Asset https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2775822

BAPI1022017

2574132 - “Cumulative Values” vs “Transactions” in “Fixed Asset” https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2574132

Component:CA-GTF-MIG

AY 219

2883430 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud migration cockpit - Available fields per asset class for fixed asset data migration: AY 219: Field.... is not ready for input https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2883430

Component:CA-GTF-MIG

AA197

Legacy data transer completed in co.code XXXX; display only is possible.

Solution: Please use APP Make Company Code Settings -Asset Accounting-Specific, in the relevant company code, the part of the current settings for the legacy data transfer is in progress (with sequential numbers in progress)

2.2.6 GA-FI-AA-MD- 006 How to fill the Cumulative Amounts and Transactions tabs in data migration

Business Context:

Customer to implement S/4HANA Cloud project, customer needs to fill in ‘accumulated amount’ and ‘transaction information’ in data migration.

Answer:

2574132 - “Cumulative Values” vs “Transactions” in “Fixed Asset”

2.2.7 GA-FI-AA-MD- 007 How to reverse legacy data migration-relevant postings

Business Context:

How can customers reverse legacy data migration related postings in an S/4HANA Cloud implementation project.

Answer:

APP: Reverse Journal Entries

2.2.8 GA-FI-AA-MD- 008 How to Test Individual Legacy Asset Postings

Business Context:

How can a customer test individual legacy asset postings in an S/4HANA Cloud implementation project.

Answer:

APP: Post Transfer Values for Legacy Asset.

3 Asset Accounting - Business Operations

3.1 GA-FI-AA-TR-001 Is settlement rule supported: AuC settlement by amount

Business Context:

Customer is implementing S/4HANA Cloud project, the asset under construction needs to be settled by amount to avoid trailing difference due to large asset amount to avoid percentage settlement.

Answer:

In the current S/4HANA Cloud release, based on process BFH, the settlement rule for AuC cannot be defined by amount, that is, settlement by amount is not possible.

In the current S/4HANA Cloud release, based on process 1NT, it is possible to match assets under construction based on investment projects, settlement rules can be defined by amount.

3.2 GA-FI-AA-TR-00 2 Fixed asset integration purchase (fixed asset number), whether the prepaid process is sup-ported

Business Context:

The fixed asset is integrated with purchasing (account category A), which supports the prepayment process. App : Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced can process down payment clearing for fixed assets invoice.

Is an AuC integrated purchase (account category A), is a prepayment process supported? Whether the relevant prepaid amount can be posted to the asset under construction.

Is the AuC integrated purchase (account category P), is a prepayment process supported?

Answer:

Fixed asset integrated purchasing (account category A), you are trying to create a down payment for an asset purchase using the following process.

  1. Manage Fixed Assets According to Scope Item J62: APP: Create Asset Card
  2. Manage purchase order or create purchase order according to Scope Item J45: APP or Create Purchase Order-Advanced: Header or line item to specify the portion or amount of down payments, account category A, asset number is the final asset card number.
  3. Monitor purchase order down payments according to Scope Item J45: APP: Find the relevant purchase order, click Create Down Payment Request, and after filling in the relevant amounts and data, click Post.

In this case, the down payment request interface reports an error F5378. Details: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/310368 Down payment with PO reference/asset account assignment.

The modification message control mentioned in the Note depends on whether the relevant SSCUI is open in the current cloud edition or whether the relevant expert configuration is available from SAP product unit.

You can consider using investment projects to complete the relevant business processes.

3.3 GA-FI-AA-TR-003 Integrated asset under construction integrated purchase (AuC number) whether the prepaid process is supported

Business Context:

Is an AuC integrated purchase (account category A), is a prepayment process supported? Whether the relevant prepaid amount can be posted to the asset under construction.

Answer:

Fixed asset integrated purchasing (account category A), you are trying to create a down payment for an asset purchase using the following process.

  1. Manage Fixed Assets According to Scope Item BFH: APP: Create Asset Card
  2. Manage purchase order or create purchase order according to Scope Item J45: APP or Create Purchase Order-Advanced: Header or line item to specify the portion or amount of down payments, account category A, asset number is the final asset card number.
  3. Monitor purchase order down payments according to Scope Item J45: APP: Find the relevant purchase order, click Create Down Payment Request, and after filling in the relevant amounts and data, click Post.

In this case, the down payment request interface reports an error F5378. Details: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/310368 Down payment with PO reference/asset account assignment.

The modification message control mentioned in the Note depends on whether the relevant SSCUI is open in the current cloud edition or whether the relevant expert configuration is available from SAP product unit.

You can consider using investment projects to complete the relevant business processes.

3.4 GA-FI-AA-TR-004 AuC integrated purchase (investment project number), whether advance payment process is supported
Business Context:
Is the AuC integrated purchase (account category P), is a prepayment process supported?
Answer:
Fixed asset integrated purchasing (account category P), you are trying to create a down payment for an asset purchase using the following process.
1. According to Scope Item 1NT: APP Project Control: Create an investment project and release the project to see the asset under construction number produced in the project.
2. Manage purchase order or create purchase order according to Scope Item J45: APP or Create Purchase Order-Advanced: fill header or line item to specify down payment scale or amount, account category P, relevant item number.
3. Monitor Purchase Order Down Payments according to Scope Item J45: APP: Find the relevant purchase order, click Create Down Payment Request, and after filling in the relevant amount and data, click Post.


3.5 GA-FI-AA-TR-005 How to Reverse an Asset-Related Posting
Business Context:
How to reverse a document posted in Asset Accounting as part of daily business for an existing asset with an acquisition posting.
Answer:
Review J62 related steps 4.5.1 Reverse Journal Entry (Asset Accounting-Specific)
As shown in the figure below, the AB08 feature, starting with the 2102 release, is replaced by the app Reverse Journal Entry.

For example, I have an asset that is retired directly, and now I find that the reimbursement is wrong, I need to cancel it, restore the activation, it's the one I directly retired by retiring, 0 the revenue

Reference link: https://help.sap.com/viewer/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/LATEST/zh-CN/d2e8595c5ca74db486f194273dd9369c.html

3.6 GA-FI-AA-TR-006 How to control how the prepaid amount exceeds the purchase order excluding tax amount
Business Context:
When the prepaid amount exceeds the purchase order amount, S/4HANA Cloud defaults to warning message F5373. You are in business need and want to change the warning message to an error message.
Answer:
Customer may request the relevant expert configuration from SAP’s product unit on an incident: change F5373 to Error. Note that the related request is passed, depending on whether the settings of the other customer are affected in the relevant client.
Background Tcode: OBA5 (database table T100C).

3.8 GA-FI-AA-TR-008 In the absence of an internal order, R&D expenses are collected by creating an R&D cost center, and R&D is successful. I want to convert into an intangible asset. How can I do this?
Answer:
Cost center distribution does not allow cost center expenses to be transferred to intangible assets, and manual financial transfers to the master data of intangible assets are possible in cases where they have been recorded to the R&D cost center; best practice is:
1.Creating asset class is 4010 (Intangible AuC) under construction master data 40006789
2. Post acquisition (integrated AP) posting R&D expenses to this AuC master data using the app in the Asset Accounting role
3. To complete the asset under construction, choose a suitable asset class or create a new asset class to create the intangible asset master data
4. Define the assignment rules with the app in the Asset Accounting role and execute the settlement from AuC to the intangible asset
5. The system starts the automatic planning of depreciation and checks whether the depreciation start date and the amount are correct.

3.10 GA-FI-AA-TR-010 asset run depreciated document is problematic, what do I want to do to reverse the rerun?

Action with reference to comment in https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2450680

3.11 GA-FI-AA-TR-011 Is there a way to mass-operate acquisitions, transfers, retirements, etc. of fixed assets?

Answer: The Fixed Assets app does not provide the functionality to perform mass operations on these businesses. However, you can do them in batches by means of iRPA, see

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2788986 has the details of the iRPA operational asset transaction

3.12 GA-FI-AA-TR-012Capitalized asset master data units cannot be updated or changed, what do you do?

Refer to note 2977472 - Base Unit of Measure can not be modified in App Manage Fixed Assets

3.13 GA-FI-AA-TR-013 What happens if the asset's salvage value changes according to the value after the as-set revaluation?

Business Context:

We are using asset revaluation as an asset impairment, but the salvage value has also been adjusted, and in the normal case the salvage value should not change after the impairment of the asset, so what should we do if we want to adjust the asset's salvage value after impairment to the normal value?

Recommendation:

Refer2468191 to do it

3.14 GA-FI-AA-TR-014 How asset depreciation increases and decreases

Business Context:

In real business, what do you do if an asset's depreciated amount needs to be increased or reduced?

Recommendation:

With reference to the test script for  J62, the following scenarios are possible:

Increase in depreciated amount:

In reference to the step 'Manual Posting of Depreciation - Unplanned and Planned', the assets adjusted as required are current-year acquisitions or prior-year acquisitions, which are handled by selecting a different transaction type;

Depreciation amount minus:

Simulate checking credit debits and posting with reference to step ‘Post Write-Up’, using transaction type: 700, entering the required field values, and the amount;

3.15 GA-FI-AA-TR-015 How does the depreciation of a fixed asset take place once in the current month?
Business Context:
There are now some new assets that are booked and need to be fully depreciated in the current month. What to do?
Recommendation:
Step 1: Create the fixed asset master data and select one of the asset classes;
Step 2: modify the depreciation key to CD03 according to the ledger;
Step 3: According to the ledger, the useful life of the asset's master data is emptied, that is, it is changed to 0, and the useful life (pe-riod) is changed to 1 and saved;
Note: If you have this type of business on a regular basis, you can create a new set of configuration, such as asset classes, account determination, and so on, to avoid impacting existing asset transactions.
3.16 How does GA-FI-AA-TR-016 increase or decrease the original value of a fixed asset?
Business Context:
Since the invoice does not arrive, the original value of the fixed asset being booked is inaccurate, there are estimates to be recorded, and when the invoice is due to be posted, an increase or decrease of the original value is required.
Procedure:
1. Manage your fixed assets using the app and find the ones you need to adjust to them.
2. Select the asset and click Post —>Post Acquisition —>Post Credit Memo

3. The key information is mainly in the Posting Information section, you need to select the following fields according to your ac-tual requirements and enter the posted amounts, or, if you have a maintenance unit, the quantities.

Credit Memo

Interpretation

Debit

Means that the original value is increased

Credit

Implies reduction of original value

Acquisition Year

Interpretation

Current Year

Post the received credit memo in the same fiscal year in which the asset received the invoice.

Previous Year

The received credit memo is posted in the fiscal year after the invoice is received for the asset.

Choose Simulate to check and finally Post.

4 Asset Accounting - Reporting
4.1 GA-FI-AA-RE-001 How to Mass View Planned Depreciation Amounts for a Year

Business Context:

In an S/4HANA Cloud implementation project, the customer wants to see the posted and planned depreciation amounts for each period of the year.

Answer:

With APP: Depreciation List, you can open the fields Posted Amounts Planned Amounts Fiscal Year Accounting Period and so on.

4.2 GA-FI-AA-RE-002 How to Realize Report-Asset Catalog

Company Code

Company Name

Asset Class

Category Name

Asset Number

Subnumber

Asset Description

Additional Instructions

Inventory number

Quantity

Base Unit of Measure

Cost Center

Cost Center Description

Plant

Plant Name

Location

Location Description

Room

Goods Supplier

Vendor Name

Ledger

Acquisition Date

Capitalization Date

Decommissioned On

Depreciation Area

Depreciation Key

Depreciation Start Date

Useful Life (Year/Month)

Unused Term (Year/Month)

Scrap Value %

Currency

Get Original Price

Scrap Value

Current Period Depreciation

Accumulated Depreciation

Unded.bal.

Answer:

 

With the app asset balances, you can output most of the data,

But

Missing field 'Not Used Period in Years/Months', please vote on https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/254946

Missing 'scrap value rate' and 'scrap value', please vote to https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/300691

'Current period depreciation' You can enter the depreciation amount from 001-012 to the end period for the month of 001-12 and then process it.

Update 20240611: The following CDS views have been provided to output information such as salvage values;
 I_AssetValuationScrapAmount
 I_AssetValuationForLedger

entry.title: Re: ODN number range should be continues for both domesti...
entry.content: Hi Jignesh, After some analysis changed the configuration for Export invoice by maintaining same document class for both Export and Domestic document.
